# Cleven G — Backend & AI Engineer
Portfolio & Freelance Services

**Website**: https://www.clevengodson.online
**Location**: Moshi, Tanzania (Kilimanjaro region) — Remote-first
**Focus**: Backend development, AI engineering, and tourism tech in East Africa.

## About Me
I'm a freelance Backend & AI Engineer and final-year Computer Science student at MWECAU. I specialize in building reliable web applications, REST APIs, booking systems, and AI-powered tools — with a strong focus on Tanzania's tourism sector.

- 2+ years experience
- 7+ projects delivered
- Open source contributor (Xenohuru — Tanzania Tourism API)
- Available for freelance work

## Key Pages

- **Home** — Main portfolio, services overview, and call to action: https://www.clevengodson.online
- **About** — Full bio, experience, and background: https://www.clevengodson.online/about
- **Projects** — Detailed case studies and work samples: https://www.clevengodson.online/projects
- **Tech Tour** — Technology + Tourism focus area: https://www.clevengodson.online/techtour
- **Setup** — Development setup / stack details: https://www.clevengodson.online/setup
- **Contact** — Get in touch for projects or collaboration: https://www.clevengodson.online/contact
- **Digital Card** — Quick profile card: https://www.clevengodson.online/card

## Expertise
- **Backend**: Django, Flask, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, MySQL, authentication systems
- **AI Engineering**: AI agents, LangChain, chatbots, Claude/Gemini integrations, automation
- **Payments**: Stripe, PayPal, Pesapal, DPO (Africa-focused)
- **Domain**: Tourism tech, booking systems, open-source tools for East Africa

## How to Use This Site
- For a quick overview → start with the homepage
- For project details → visit /projects
- For collaboration → use /contact
- For technical background → /about and /setup
